_doc: Per-event custom button URL override for the main site (themakeupblowout.com) Register / 'Get my gift' buttons. The weekly homepage-schedule sync uses urls[<key>] as the button's signupUrl if present; otherwise it falls back to the event's landing page, then its SimpleTexting form, then the internal /register page. Browser/manually editable, GitHub-synced (IRON RULE #7).
